translations: to you Our verses and purifies you
and the wisdom and teaches you
puzzle.hint: This verse describes how Allah sent Prophet Muhammad ﷺ with a sacred mission to teach, purify, and guide believers—perfect for memorizing.
puzzle.arabic: كَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا فِيكُمْ رَسُولًۭا مِّنكُمْ يَتْلُوا۟ عَلَيْكُمْ ءَايَـٰتِنَا وَيُزَكِّيكُمْ وَيُعَلِّمُكُمُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَٱلْحِكْمَةَ وَيُعَلِّمُكُم مَّا لَمْ تَكُونُوا۟ تَعْلَمُونَ
puzzle.verseEn: Just as We have sent among you a messenger from yourselves reciting to you Our verses and purifying you and teaching you the Book and wisdom and teaching you that which you did not know.
